# LinkedIn — Services

**Page title:** Chan's Services
**Open to work:** yes
**Availability:** Remote or in person (Auckland)

**Overview:**

```
I take AI ideas from "we should build that" to systems production users actually rely on. Agentic infrastructure — retrieval, memory, tool use, evaluations — designed in from day one. Production-rigorous: load tests, zero-downtime migrations, privacy by default. Solo end-to-end when speed matters; paired with your team when continuity does. I document what I build and train your engineers to keep shipping after I leave.
```

- IT Consulting
